ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
You can specify which value to use for the CSS property 'white-space'. 
					Intended uses are 'pre' or 'nowrap'.
ast.target:
您可以指定用于 CSS 属性 'white-space' 的值。
					预期用途是 'pre' 或 'nowrap'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colors the tags in the body of a note. Main setting to disable most usages.
ast.target: 为笔记正文中的标签着色。禁用大多数用途的主要设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses a tag in the note's properties, and applies its color to the workspace background
ast.target: 使用笔记属性中的标签，并将其颜色应用于工作区背景

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colors the tags in a note's properties.
ast.target: 为笔记属性中的标签着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Allows you to view and use some extra debug option. 
				Don't use these if you don't know what you are doing.
ast.target:
允许您查看和使用一些额外的调试选项。
				如果您不知道自己在做什么，请勿使用这些选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto detects changes in a file's property's tags and updates the file viewer.
ast.target: 自动检测文件属性标签中的更改并更新文件查看器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Traverses your vault and stores all tags found in notes with the same name as the folder they are found in.
ast.target: 遍历您的保险库，并将笔记中找到的所有标签存储在与其所在文件夹同名的笔记中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define custom colors for tags.
ast.target: 为标签定义自定义颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Applies the tag color, of the tag within the card, to the background color of the card. 
				Known issue: When a card has multiple tags, the color of the card is randomly chosen.
ast.target: 将卡片内标签的标签颜色应用到卡片的背景色。\n\t\t\t\t已知问题：当卡片有多个标签时，卡片的颜色是随机选择的。\n\t\t\t

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Hides the '#' from the kanban view, 
					though they still have to be typed out within the used areas.
ast.target: 在看板视图中隐藏 '#'，\n\t\t\t\t\t尽管在使用区域中仍然需要输入它们。\n\t\t\t

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Applies the tag color, of the tag within the list's title, to the background color of the list. 
				Known issue: When a list has multiple tags, the color of the list is randomly chosen.
ast.target: 将列表标题内标签的标签颜色应用到列表的背景色。\n\t\t\t\t已知问题：当列表有多个标签时，列表的颜色是随机选择的。\n\t\t\t

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables an opacity offset for a tag's background color
ast.target: 为标签的背景色启用透明度偏移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows the usage of `;` or `\n` (new line) to bind multiple tags to one color.
ast.target: 允许使用 `;` 或 `\\n`（换行符）将多个标签绑定到一种颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Adds a small button next to each color picker, allowing users to auto generate an appropriate background color.
				This chosen color isn't always 100%, so please adjust when needed
ast.target: 在每个颜色选择器旁边添加一个小按钮，允许用户自动生成合适的背景色。\n\t\t\t\t此选择的颜色并非总是 100% 准确，请根据需要调整。\n\t\t\t

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Applies the tag color, of the tag within the canvas's card, to the background color of the canvas card.
			The Value slider and setter to the right, are the luminance offsets for the background.
ast.target: 将画布卡片内标签的标签颜色应用到画布卡片的背景色。\n\t\t\t右侧的数值滑块和设置器是背景的亮度偏移量。\n\t\t\t

ast.name: name
ast.source: Creates a code block at caret of color groups, which you can manually copy into the graph.json file.
ast.target: 在光标处创建一个颜色组的代码块，您可以手动将其复制到 graph.json 文件中。

ast.name: name
ast.source: EXPERIMENTAL : export tags to graph.json. This overwrites your current graph.json. Use at own risk!
ast.target: 实验性：将标签导出到 graph.json。这将覆盖您当前的 graph.json。使用风险自负！

ast.name: name
ast.source: EXPERIMENTAL : export TAGS LINKED TO FOLDER NOTES to graph.json. This overwrites your current graph.json. Use at own risk!
ast.target: 实验性：将链接到文件夹笔记的标签导出到 graph.json。这将覆盖您当前的 graph.json。使用风险自负！

ast.name: name

ast.target: 实验性：CSS 样式转为代码块。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Don't add the '#' before the tag.
ast.target: 不要在标签前添加 '#'。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you forget this, this is done in code for you, resulting in the input being changed.
ast.target: 如果您忘记了，代码会为您完成此操作，导致输入被更改。
